tools.name: python3
tools.purpose: Runs service tests, YAML checks, readiness gates, report generators, and local automation.

tools.name: helm
tools.purpose: Lints and renders all platform charts and customer overlays.

tools.install_hint: Run `make toolchain-install` or install kubeconform from yannh/kubeconform releases.
tools.name: kubeconform
tools.purpose: Validates Kubernetes YAML against schemas before customer handoff.

tools.install_hint: Run `make toolchain-install` or install the Kyverno CLI release asset.
tools.name: kyverno
tools.purpose: Runs policy-as-code tests for labels, pod security, resources, image tags, and signature policy.

tools.install_hint: Install `github.com/RamazanKara/restore-drill/cmd/restore-drill` or use the customer's packaged binary.
tools.name: restore-drill
tools.purpose: Validates restore-drill configuration and runs application-data restore evidence.

tools.install_hint: Run `make toolchain-install` or install k6 from Grafana release packages.
tools.name: k6
tools.purpose: Validates and runs gateway load-test scenarios.

tools.install_hint: Run `make toolchain-install` or install Syft from Anchore release packages.
tools.name: syft
tools.purpose: Generates filesystem and image SBOM evidence.

tools.install_hint: Run `make toolchain-install` or install the Argo CD CLI release asset.
tools.name: argocd
tools.purpose: Validates local GitOps client compatibility for Argo CD workflows.

tools.install_hint: Run `make toolchain-install` or install Cosign from Sigstore release packages.
tools.name: cosign
tools.purpose: Verifies image-signing workflows and customer promotion gates.

tools.install_hint: Run `make toolchain-install` or install Trivy from Aqua Security release packages.
tools.name: trivy
tools.purpose: Runs filesystem, secret, config, and image vulnerability scans.

tools.install_hint: Install Docker Desktop or a compatible Docker Engine.
tools.name: docker
tools.purpose: Builds local service images and runs kind nodes.

tools.install_hint: Install kind from the upstream Kubernetes SIGs release artifacts.
tools.name: kind
tools.purpose: Creates the local Kubernetes reference cluster.

tools.install_hint: Install kubectl matching the customer's supported Kubernetes minor versions.
tools.name: kubectl
tools.purpose: Applies manifests, inspects local readiness, and runs live evidence checks.

tools.install_hint: Install Go 1.25 or newer for the CI-aligned validation path.
tools.name: go
tools.purpose: Builds or installs Go-based validation utilities such as kubeconform, Kyverno CLI, and restore-drill.
